summary: AI audience platform for pharma commercialization.
editor_note: The sharper idea is removing PHI from pharma targeting instead of pretending healthcare marketing is ordinary ads. Pathwai learns from de-identified health signals, clusters patient journeys, and cites outcomes like 2,000 extra patients reached in three weeks and 90% lower cost per patient. Compared with static audience files, it sells a learning system for commercial teams. The risk is whether better targeting feels like better healthcare to anyone outside pharma.
